news.title: Dhurandhar 2: Ranveer Singh-starrer completes 100 days at the box office
news.snippet: Ranveer Singh's Dhurandhar: The Revenge has successfully completed 100 days at the Indian box office, marking a special milestone for the film. The makers celebrated the achievement with a special post

news.title: Kospi crisis unlikely to hit Indian markets
news.snippet: Market likely to remain rangebound; IT stocks may not face significant pressure

news.title: Business News | Reliance Jio Strengthens Telecom Market Leadership with Subscriber Growth in May 2026: TRAI Data
news.snippet: Get latest articles and stories on Business at LatestLY. Jio also maintained its dominance in the Visitor Location Register (VLR) segment, holding a Customer Market Share (CMS) of 44.2 per cent. The company's VLR share increased by 132 basis points year-on-year, marking the highest annual gain among all telecom operators.
